title: modes: Preset::Extend and Preset::Refactor differ only by scope — both Autonomous/Pragmatic make them near-duplicates
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Structural Modularity / DRY. Location: src/modes/mod.rs:292-315 (from_preset Extend and Refactor). Violation: Both presets are Autonomous + Pragmatic, differing only in scope (Adjacent vs Unrestricted). Their assembled prompts share 2 of 3 axis fragments. This is a very thin differentiation and forces users to know the subtle difference. The test all_presets_produce_unique_modes passes only because of the scope difference. Mandated Refactor: (a) Merge into a single 'Extend' preset with an optional 'refactor' modifier that expands scope; or (b) Document clearly in description() why both exist with a concrete example of when to pick each. Current description strings 'Extend and improve incrementally' vs 'Restructure freely across the codebase' do not clearly articulate the decision boundary.
